new_text: ARXIV: EvoAgentX (arXiv:2507.03616) - Framework automating multi-agent workflow evolution via TextGrad (prompt refinement), AFlow (topology optimization), MIPRO (tool tuning). Achieves 7.44% HotPotQA F1, 10% MBPP pass@1, 20% GAIA accuracy gains. Torus applicability: Add evaluation-driven acceptance gates (mirrors Gate 5 PROOF), modular validation per tier, multi-algorithm consensus voting. Pattern: "optimization tournament" to gate config — run multiple strategies, vote on best prompt revision.

[torus-web #11] Test expansion: 618→1,115 tests ALL PASSING across 102 files. Added: 10 component tests (feature-card, wallet-selection-modal, etc.); ~288 API tests across esports, auth, admin, users routes; libs (steam-state, x-state, utils, x-auth, esports-metadata-calculator, mongodb); 6 component/hooks files. Fixed canvas/jsdom compatibility: OffscreenCanvas, Path2D, HTMLCanvasElement.getContext stubs. Only remaining: E2E tests with Playwright.

TRv1 test coverage audit (2026-02-20): CRITICAL GAPS: passive-stake (0 tests), treasury (0 tests), developer-rewards (0 tests), governance processor (0 tests), developer_fees.rs (2 stub tests only), stake-client (0 tests). GOOD: fee-market (~35), trv1_constants (5), fee_distribution (22), fee_integration (6), slashing (8), governance vote_weight (7), 4 fuzz targets. PRIORITY: Write program-test integration tests for 4 program crates + developer_fees credit path.

Orchestration skills guide (Session 362): /ralph (autonomous loop, tedious tasks, 10 iterations max); /chain (skill pipeline convenience); /prp-wave (10+ parallel tasks). Combinations: ralph+chain=autonomous fix-test-commit; chain+prp-wave=phased execution; ralph+prp-wave=batch processing. Progression: ralph (try)→chain (standardize)→prp-wave (scale). Loop (interactive, you drive) ≠ ralph (autonomous, Claude drives).

Session 374: 5 pi-agent features complete. (1) CircuitBreaker: CLOSED/OPEN/HALF_OPEN, 3-crash/5min, 60s cooldown, T1 never skipped, JSON persist. (2) ObservationStore: compress() for bash/edit/write/task, buffered LanceDB, error patterns, secrets scrub. (3) 4 analytics: gate_timing, rw_ratio, all_metrics, circuit_states. (4) fuzzy_search: token-based LanceDB keyword search. (5) memory_maintenance: decay(30d)/dedup(0.95)/compact(60d). Result: 175 tests pass, 21 tools (was 17).

Heartbeat implementation (2026-03-09): Chose OpenClaw-style over custom daemon. Single cron: */30 9-1 * * * flock -n /tmp/torus-heartbeat.lock claude... Cost: $0.05/day vs $0.37/day (7x cheaper). Design: One HEARTBEAT.md checklist (Health every run, Memory every 12h, auto-fix, TG alert if issues). Why: reliability (cron bulletproof), cost, simplicity (1 file vs 4), maintainability. Token impact: ~800 input + ~200 output per heartbeat.

Programmatic Tool Calling (PTC) - API feature for Opus/Sonnet 4.6/4.5. Claude writes script calling multiple tools in code execution container, filters/aggregates in code, returns results. Setup: Enable code_execution_20260120, mark tools with allowed_callers. Performance: 11% accuracy gain, 24% fewer input tokens, 37% reduction on complex research. Use case: batch file scanning, multi-source queries. Relevant for voice-web and custom agents.

External tools explored: (1) coleam00/excalidraw-skill: 7,850 words (~13k tokens) for diagram generation. Cost $0.24/prompt. (2) zsviczian/obsidian-excalidraw: visual editing plugin, complementary. (3) anthropics/skill-creator: evals.json, run_eval.py parallel testing, run_loop.py iterative optimization, 3 agents (analyzer, comparator, grader). Could eval 35 skills. (4) financial-datasets/mcp-server: stock/crypto data, paid API, lightweight tokens.

Full audit torus-pi-agent vs Claude Code (session 372). PORTED: 17 gates, 17 tools, auto-RAG, 5 skills, AGENTS.md. NOT PORTED gaps: (1) Circuit breakers. (2) Observation capture. (3) Gate timing/rw_ratio/all_metrics tools. (4) fuzzy_search. (5) Memory maintenance. LOW PRIORITY gaps: 40 analytics dashboard tools, search_server, skill_server, web_search, ~50 shared modules. Claude Code: 5 MCP servers, 75 tools, 67 modules. Pi-agent: 17 tools, 32 files.

MCP input_examples research (2026-03-09): (1) Claude API: supported ONLY in advanced-tool-use-2025-11-20 BETA. (2) MCP spec: NO input_examples in Tool type (name, title, description, icons, inputSchema, outputSchema only). (3) FastMCP: NO input_examples decorator param. (4) Claude Code+MCP: Translates inputSchema→input_schema, no evidence it enables beta or passes input_examples. Result: input_examples cannot be used via MCP currently.

Session 386: ZeroClaw migration from OpenClaw. Migrate command auto-deduplicated 354 memories. Manual: 17 OpenRouter keys to [model_providers] in config.toml (auto-encrypted enc2: prefix), TG config (needed allowed_users + snake_case bot_token). Config fixes: wire_api="chat_completions" (not openai-completions), autonomy="readonly"/"supervised"/"full", default_provider="openrouter"+OPENROUTER_API_KEY. Installed 15/18 skills (3 blocked). Free models can't do agentic workflows; need paid model.

Session 293: Created /brainstorm and /writing-plans skills (AKIRA pipeline). /brainstorm: 2-3 design options (Name/How/Files/Trade-offs/Effort/Risk)→docs/plans/<slug>.md. /writing-plans: TDD implementation plans (exact code, test-first, verification)→docs/plans/<slug>-impl.md. Pipeline: /brainstorm→pick option→/writing-plans→/build. Both integrate memory. Bypass plan-mode bugs (exit loop, code-in-plan-mode). Impact: biggest wins are consistency (templated output) and quality (forced options).

Session 363: Skill optimization - Option 2+3+4. Loop rewritten: memory→/brainstorm→/writing-plans→/implement→/test→/review→/commit. /brainstorm replaces EnterPlanMode, /implement replaces /build (no plan-mode). Active skills (11): brainstorm, commit, deep-dive, explore, fix, implement, review, status, test, wrap-up, writing-plans. Dormanted (8): build, prp-wave, learn, chain, ralph, research, deploy, web. Token savings: ~6,375/message.

Session 175: (1) Memory-Architecture-Diagram.html at ~/Desktop: 1,845 lines, 92KB, 11 interactive dark tabs. Converted 900 lines .md via 3 Sonnet subagents. (2) 3-branch comparison (master/evolve-test/Sprint-2) across 12 dimensions: Sprint-2 scored 96/120 due to lower token cost. (3) Gate 12 cleanup: removed refs from statusline.py, gate_correlator.py, audit_log.py, ARCHITECTURE.md. (4) Gate 17 injection: fires only WebFetch/WebSearch, Q-learning reorders dynamically.

Session 346: iOS Safari TTS debugging. WORKS: edge-tts (pip install), /tts endpoint MP3, AudioContext (Web Audio API) bypasses autoplay restrictions when created from user gesture, BufferSourceNode playback, voice picker dropdown, localStorage. DOESN'T WORK YET: response timing (poller grabs partial text mid-generation). Tried stability check, bare marker checks (both failed). NEXT: Debug why Brewed/Cogitated marker didn't fire in _pane_is_done(). iOS key: Audio unlocked via gesture stays unlocked.
